Jack’s Civilization by Sinner Rated: PG [Reviews - 0] New!
Summary:

Twelve-year-old Jack King wakes up to a normal morning, only to find himself flooded with an absolute, terrifyingly boundless cosmic energy that freezes his cells in perfect eternal youth. Seeking a realm to test his absolute supremacy, he uses his reality-warping power to shrink down all the world's religions.

Kink Island by Joyce Julep Rated: X [Reviews - 1] New!
Summary:

Hey guys! I'm really excited to share this story with you! It's part of a long-term roleplay I've been having with a wonderful client for a number of years -- at this point there are almost 40 chapters! The premise is simple: a young man named Damien has won a trip to an island resort, but this island is...well...it's a special island. Let's just put it that way, lol. Something far and beyond what Damien could have imagined. And it scares him, but also desperately arouses him.

East of Eve by Joyce Julep Rated: R [Reviews - 5] New!
Summary:

Eve and Jason are boyfriend-girlfriend, and they're just about to start college. Eve is 6'1 and Jason is 5'8, but he more than compensates for his lack of height by being a heavily-muscled wrestling star. On the surface, their relationship looks like it couldn't be better. But underneath, what's actually going on? Especially now that Jason notices that Eve is actually...getting bigger. Written as a commission! Crista is a trans high school girl who nevertheless is self-conscious about the size of her balls. So she decides to remedy this anxiety the only way her gooner brain knows how: shrinking her other classmates and stuffing them down her dick! The Higher Plain by Prophet Rated: G [Reviews - 2] New!
Summary:

All my life I was told of the great old ones that resided in the upper plain of Xylarion, these beings where so far above us that even a small strain of their hair could wipe out dozens of us regular people. 


Never in my life did I ever think that I would see one of those legendary beings, yea that was until one landed right in front of my families farm. 


This can't be good.

Giant Lesbians Have Had Enough of Your Sh*t by tecks Rated: PG [Reviews - 0] New!
Summary:

Get ready for one of my longer books - a full novella of size-shifting fun with an emphasis on character, noms, and a little rare sauciness - find out what happens when two hapless lesbians get caught up in a world of size-warping forbidden tech! This is 20 chapters long, which I plan to release steadily in full here. (It is also available in eBook and paperback already.)

I've had an itch to share something a bit more substantial on here, and with my book sales channels generally drying up a little, I'd love this more ambitious project from a few years back to reach more people (I'm pretty sure this book doesn't even show on certain booksellers unless you're really specific with your search).

Here's the blurb:

Violet and Nova are ready for some big changes. A lot of people are going to get hurt.

Violet is fed up with her boring life and society in general. Angry at her latest commute, she bumps into Dr Harper Roan at just the right time.

Violet accidentally takes something of Harper’s: a device with the incredible power to shrink things – or make them grow. And with a little encouragement from her bombastic partner Nova, Violet realises it might be just what they need to shake things up.

Starting by punishing anyone who crosses them.

But the shrinking device comes with complications: Harper’s dangerous employees are out to recapture it, each use connects to something terrible, and Violet is getting new, voracious desires . . .

Just as well this hapless couple are hungry for a fight.

From miniaturising victims to earthshaking growth experiments, a bit of wild fun quickly turns deadly. If they can survive the horrors they’ve unleashed, how far are they prepared to go?

One thing’s for sure: things are about to change in a BIG way.


Categories: Giantess, Couples, Crush, Destruction, Entrapment, Feet, Growing Woman, Insertion, Lesbians, Mouth Play, Sci-Fi, Violent, Vore

Shrunken Class Pet by Ava Greenwood Rated: X [Reviews - 54] New!
Summary:

High school is a confusing time of sexual awakening for many young students. But navigating the bizarre social climate of high school becomes even more bizarre with the spread of a strange new disease, the Shrinking Virus: a virus that affects men at a disproportionate rate.

In the new world, diminishing teenage boys must discover their growing bodies, simultaneously shrinking. They must witness the beauty and danger of their goddess-like teachers. And they must dodge the deadly footfalls of colossal classmates as plaid skirts flutter overhead. All while the overgrown women discover their place as the dominant sex.

Ms. Stone, a strict yet encouraging math teacher, witnesses one of her only male students, Adam, shrink in her classroom. The teacher soon decides she must guide the younger generation of women as they navigate the world of shrinking men. And Adam will make for the perfect teaching prop, whether he likes it or not.

WARNING: Sexually explicit content intended for adults. All characters are fictional and written to be 18 years or older.

Thank you so much for reading & supporting me in creating more content!

For early access to this story & more, consider checking out my Patreon at:

https://www.patreon.com/AvaGreenwood

Are You Sure You’re Ready to Submit? by Sapphiric Rated: R [Reviews - 4] New!
Summary:

Evan and Haley are college students and resentful stepsiblings bound together by inheritance and a shared house after their parents' deaths. Evan, shy and secretly harboring a shrinking fetish, has always felt intimidated by his smug, sharp-tongued younger stepsister Haley and her effortlessly perfect body.

Hoping to impress his sweet crush Jessie, Evan secretly applies to ShrinkHaven for a gentle, one-day shrinking experience to share with her. But a random glitch during submission leaves his application vulnerable—something he fails to notice and never anticipates might completely upend his innocent plan.

-----------------------
